200.description: This endpoint is documentation-only. Use Socket.IO to connect.
This endpoint is documentation-only. Use Socket.IO to connect.

get.description:
## Event: `join_conversation`
**Direction:** Client → Server

### Usage

```javascript
// Call this after creating a new conversation via REST API
socket.emit('join_conversation', { conversationId: '<uuid>' });
```

### Notes
- On connect, the server auto-joins the socket to ALL existing conversation rooms
- Use this event only for conversations created AFTER the socket connected
- No server response — this is a fire-and-forget operation

get.summary: 📥 message_sent — ACK for your sent message
📥 messages_read — Read receipt from other participant

dateOfBirth.description: Date of birth in ISO format

profile.description: Optional profile data to create alongside the account

taxCode.description: Tax code of the business (unique identifier)

provinceId.description: UUID of the province (from Location tree)

districtId.description: UUID of the district (from Location tree)

wardId.description: UUID of the ward (from Location tree)

phoneNumber.description: Contact phone number for the business

urls.description: Array of URLs to document files

idNumber.description: ID number (9 or 12 digits for Vietnam)

accountId.description: ID of the created partner account

businessEntityId.description: ID of the created business entity

access_token.description: JWT access token for immediate authentication

refresh_token.description: JWT refresh token for obtaining new access tokens
Refresh token obtained from login or previous refresh

email.description: The email of the admin/partner user

password.description: The password of the admin/partner user

survey.description: Stored survey payload or null if none
Arbitrary survey payload. Example structure below.

data.description: List of all available business types

uploadUrl.description: Presigned URL for uploading the file

key.description: Storage key for the uploaded file

url.description: Public or signed URL for the file

formattedAddress.example: 227 Nguyen Van Cu, District 5, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam

example: District 7, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam

apiKey.description: Mapbox public access token for frontend/mobile SDKs

start.description: Work start time in HH:mm format. Empty string if not working.

end.description: Work end time in HH:mm format. Empty string if not working.

isWorking.description: Whether the employee is working on this day.

isCurrent.description: Whether this is the current position

updatedTime.description: ISO timestamp of the last update

fieldKey.description: Unique key identifying the document field (e.g. "id_card", "other_documents")

documents.description: Array of document entries for this field

partnerId.description: Partner ID the employee belongs to
Partner ID the employee belongs to

doctorProfile.description: Doctor profile data if role is DOCTOR

therapistProfile.description: Therapist profile data if role is THERAPIST

time.description: Slot start time in HH:mm (24h) format

isBusy.description: Whether the slot is free or busy

isWorkingDay.description: Whether the employee works on this day

slots.description: Time slots for this day (empty if not working)

serviceCount.description: Number of health services in this category

parentId.description: Parent category ID for hierarchical structure
Parent category ID for hierarchical structure

isPrimary.description: Whether this is the primary employee

description.example: Avoid eating 2 hours before the service
Arrive at the reception and complete registration
Avoid eating 2 hours before the service
Arrive at the reception and complete registration
Avoid eating 2 hours before the service
Arrive at the reception and complete registration

productDefinition.description: Product definition (required if type is service)
Product definition (required if type is service)

subtitle.example: Full body mole mapping and skin health check

address.example: 123 Wellness Avenue, Ho Chi Minh City

eligibilityId.description: product_employee_eligibility surrogate PK for this employee–service pair

isPrimary.description: Whether this is the primary employee

fieldKey.description: Key of the field being reviewed

decision.description: Overall decision on the partner profile

items.description: List of specific items (fields or documents) with their validation status

idempotencyKey.description: Idempotency key to prevent duplicate requests from AI retry

webhookUrl.description: Webhook URL to receive checkout result

id.description: Ticket ID (same as ticket_id in webhook)

isReviewed.description: Whether the user has reviewed this appointment

distanceKm.description: Distance from user to clinic in kilometers (null if coordinates not provided)

description.example: Full body deep tissue massage for relief
Avoid eating 2 hours before the service
Arrive at the reception and complete registration

serviceIds.description: List of service IDs to retrieve recommendations for

name.example: Phục hồi cột sống chuyên sâu

appointmentId.description: ID of the completed appointment to review

photoKeys.description: S3 keys of uploaded photos (max 5). Upload via POST /v1/s3/presign first.

specialistId.description: ID of the specialist/employee who performed the service

wouldRecommend.description: Whether the user would recommend this specialist

requestType.description: MoMo request type: captureWallet | payWithATM | payWithCC

transId.description: MoMo transaction ID from the original payment (required for refund)

participantAccountId.description: Account ID of the other party (partner or user)

bookingId.description: Optional booking context for the conversation

initialMessage.description: Optional first message to start the conversation

url.description: Socket.IO namespace URL for WebSocket connection

auth.description: Authentication method — pass JWT token in the Socket.IO auth object

content.example: Hello, I have a question about my appointment.

clientMessageId.description: Client-generated UUID for idempotent delivery (prevents duplicates on retry)

conversationId.description: Conversation UUID where user is typing
Conversation UUID to mark as read
Conversation UUID to join (auto-joined on connect, use this for new conversations)

content.example: Hello, I have a question about my appointment.

clientMessageId.description: Echoed client message ID for matching
